result:
Added a `today` journaling command to the CLI. It now creates `notes/YYYY-MM-DD.md` if today’s note does not exist and opens that file in `$EDITOR`, using the date string as both the note ID and heading. The command is wired into dispatch and usage output in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go).

I also added coverage for the new flow in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go): creating a daily note, reopening without overwriting existing content, and confirming `run([]string{"today"})` reaches the editor path. The README examples and behavior notes were updated in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md).

Verification is limited here because the environment does not have the Go toolchain installed: `go test ./...` failed with `go: command not found`.
